title: Sezino Launch Party
description: Join us for an unforgettable evening as we unveil the future of event management technology. Sezino is the most beautiful platform for hosting startup launches, product demos, and community meetups. Enjoy cocktails, demo stations, and a live DJ set.

title: Solana Hacker House
description: Build on Solana for 12 hours straight. This hacker house brings together the best Web3 developers to build decentralized applications, smart contracts, and DeFi protocols. Prizes in SOL tokens for the best dApps.

title: AI Agents Workshop: Build Your Own
description: Hands-on workshop to build autonomous AI agents using LangChain, LLMs, and RAG pipelines. Learn prompt engineering, fine-tuning techniques, and how to deploy your own GPT-powered chatbot with embeddings and vector databases.

title: Natural Wine Tasting Evening
description: Discover small-batch natural wines from independent vineyards. Our expert sommelier will guide you through a curated tasting of 8 wines paired with artisanal cheese and charcuterie. Learn about organic winemaking and terroir.

title: Sunrise Yoga & Sound Bath
description: Start your day with an oceanfront yoga session followed by a healing sound bath meditation. Our certified yoga instructor and sound healer will guide you through breathwork, vinyasa flow, and crystal bowl sound therapy for deep relaxation.

title: Ethereum Denver Afterparty
description: The official afterparty for Ethereum Denver. Celebrate with the Web3 community after a week of hacking on DAOs, NFTs, and DeFi protocols. Open bar, live music, and networking with top blockchain builders.

title: React Conf 2026: Frontend Reimagined
description: A full-day developer conference covering React Server Components, the latest in TypeScript, modern frontend architecture, and performance optimization. Featuring talks from core team members and hands-on coding workshops.

title: Farm-to-Table Supper Club
description: An intimate 5-course dining experience featuring locally sourced ingredients from Tennessee farms. Chef Maria creates a seasonal menu with craft cocktail pairings. Limited to 24 guests for an exclusive supper club atmosphere.

title: Skincare Science Masterclass
description: Learn the science behind effective skincare with board-certified dermatologist Dr. Priya Patel. Covers ingredient analysis, building personalized routines, understanding retinoids, peptides, and SPF. Includes product samples and a mini facial.

title: Generative AI Art Gallery
description: An immersive gallery showcasing art created with diffusion models, GANs, and neural style transfer. Featuring works from artists pushing the boundaries of AI-generated art, with interactive installations where guests can create their own generative pieces in real-time.
